# decorations

**Instance Property**

Asks the item for an array of decorations.

## Declaration

```swift
var decorations: [NSFileProviderItemDecorationIdentifier]? { get }
```

## Discussion

The system calls this method to request the item’s decorations. Your implementation should return an array of [doc://com.apple.fileprovider/documentation/FileProvider/NSFileProviderItemDecorationIdentifier] instances.
title: decorations
